title: Niko OneShot Totem
description:
silly resource pack that replaces totem of undying with a Niko plush
this resource pack includes:
•custom model
•custom texture
•custom name
•custom subtitle text
•custom sound effect
body:
this resource pack brings to life a Niko plush from a game "OneShot" by 
Future Cat LLC, you can modify and use models files however you want by using blockbench

it will replace totem of undying and all releated to it with Niko themed ones!

> rename your totem to 'nikoplush' to turn it into plush without lightbulb
> rename your totem to 'nikoplushl' to turn it into normal plush

_character by Future Cat LLC_
